鬼ヶ島をプロデュース……つまり、鬼ヶ島のいいところを人間のみなさんに<br>知っ:
Promoting Oni Island — in order to let humans discover its charms,
those doing the promoting need to know it inside and out——
――ということでしたので、<br>まずは私が旦那様たちをご案内しますね♪:
——Which is why, first things first,
I'll be giving my darling a tour♪
まずはこちらが鬼ヶ島の象徴とも呼べる門です。<br>どうです？ 鬼の頭が飾られて:
First, this is Oni Island's symbol — the gate!
What do you think? Pretty intimidating with those oni heads, right?
大迫力……ではあるな。<br>むしろおどろおどろしいレベルだ。:
Intimidating is... one way to put it.
More like horrifying, honestly.
なるほど……これは趣深い。誰が住む集落かはっきりわかるし、<br>外敵への威嚇に:
I see... quite fascinating. It makes clear who lives here,
serves as a deterrent to enemies. A sort of ward, I'd say.
え？ ま、魔除け……？<br>あの……歓迎の意味を込めているのですが……: Hm? A-a ward...? Um... it's meant to convey a warm welcome...
ごまかせてないぞー。しかし、門をくぐった先にある灯篭まで<br>鬼の頭の形をして:
That's not a convincing cover. But even the lanterns past the gate
are shaped like oni heads. It's too ominous right from the entrance.
さすがは旦那様、よくぞ気づかれました！ どうです、かっこいいでしょう？<br>鬼:
As expected of my darling! What do you think — cool, right?
The oni-folk are a people who find ominous things to be cool!
それにですね、この門。これには、ある仕掛けがございまして。<br>ささっ、こちら:
And you see, this gate — it has a special mechanism!
Come, please stand right in front of the oni head.
『おぉぉぉぉぉ～～！！ 悪い子はいねぇがぁぁ～～！！』: 'Whooooo~~!! Are there any bad children out thereee~~!!'
しゃ、喋った……！？ それに鬼の目が光ったぞ！？: I-it spoke...!? And the oni's eyes just lit up!?
地獄の底から響いてくるような声だな。<br>盗賊が夜襲をかけようとしても、裸足で:
A voice that sounds like it rises from the depths of hell.
Any bandits planning a night raid would flee barefoot.
うふふ、すごい仕掛けですよね？<br>鬼族の職人が腕によりをかけて作り、代々受け:
Hehe, quite the mechanism, isn't it? Crafted by our
finest artisans and passed down through the generations!
へっへっへ、今日も調子いいみたいだなぁ！<br>これで出迎えれば、人間の子供たち:
Heh heh heh, working great today! Welcome guests with this
and the human kids'll love it!!
喜ぶかぁっ！ 怖すぎてギャン泣きするわ！！: Love it!? They'll bawl their eyes out from pure terror!!
くっ……！ ダメだ、こいつら……！<br>人間と感覚が違い過ぎる……！:
Ugh...! It's hopeless... these guys...
They're just too different from humans...!
え、えぇっと……だ、旦那様、鬼ヶ島には他にも魅力があるんですよ！<br>なんとい:
U-um... d-darling, Oni Island has other charms too!
Hot springs! Perfect for soothing travel fatigue!
ほお？ それはいいな。客をもてなすのにぴったりじゃないか。<br>さっそく案内し:
Oh? Now that's promising. Perfect for entertaining guests.
Take us there right away?
はいっ、とぉってもいい泉質なんですよ～。<br>旦那様もぜひ、長旅の疲れを癒して:
Yes! The water quality is absolutely wonderful~.
Please, darling, let it wash away your travel fatigue♪
何って、温泉ですよ？<br>旦那様が楽しみにされていた。:
What do you mean, it's a hot spring? The one you were looking
forward to.
……この、血みたいに真っ赤で、<br>グツグツと煮えたぎったものが、温泉……？: ...This blood-red, violently bubbling thing is... a hot spring...?
はいっ。どうです、いい感じでしょう？<br>これが鬼ヶ島の名所、灼熱地獄温泉です:
Yes! How does it look? This is Oni Island's famous landmark:
the Scorching Hell Hot Spring♪
とっても気持ちいいので、せっかくですから入られてはいかがですか？<br>お背中、:
It feels absolutely amazing, so how about a soak while you're here?
I'll even scrub your back~.
いやいやいや、絶対死ぬだろ！<br>いったい何度あるんだよ、そのお湯！: No no no no, that would kill me! What temperature is that water!?
なにさ、いい湯加減じゃないのよ。: What's the fuss, that's a nice temperature.
死・ぬ・わっ！！ どれだけ丈夫なんだよ、鬼族！？<br>それに名前も怖すぎるわ！:
I'd — die — there!! How tough are you people!?
And that name is way too scary!!
見た目にピッタリの名前だってのに、<br>何が不満なのさ！: The name fits perfectly, so what's your problem!
あの世に直行させてどうする！<br>とことんずれてるな、鬼族は！:
That sends you straight to the afterlife! The oni-folk are completely
off-base!
すみません、旦那様……。<br>やっぱり、プロデュースは難しいでしょうか……:
I'm sorry, darling... is promoting us
really that difficult...?
……早とちりするな。難しいが、無理だとは言ってない。<br>シラエス、どう思う？:
...Don't jump to conclusions. Hard, but not impossible.
Shiraes, what do you think?
泉質自体はいいようだよ。<br>川の水か地下水を引き込んで温度を調整すれば、問題:
The water quality itself is quite good.
Mix in river or groundwater to adjust the heat, and it should work.
ほう？ 確かに、硫黄の香りといい、温泉地らしい雰囲気もある。<br>ここまでの装:
Hm. The sulfur smell, the atmosphere — there's something to work
with. If we reframe those decorations as part of the theme... could work?
……よし。クレハ、それに鬼族のみんなも聞いてくれ。<br>大仕事になるが、気張っ:
...Alright. Kureha, and all the oni-folk too — listen up.
This'll be a big job, but give it your all. First off——
どうにも人間とズレた鬼族をプロデュースすべく、<br><user>は作戦を語り始:
To promote these hopelessly out-of-sync oni-folk,
%user% began to lay out his plan——
<user>は作戦の遂行状況を確認すべく、<br>人間と仲良くする方法を教える、:
%user% set out to check progress at Shiraes's outdoor seminar:
lessons on befriending humans.
さて……俺の方は順調だが、シラエスはうまくやってるだろうか。<br>人間と仲良く:
Well... my side is going smoothly, but I wonder about Shiraes.
She should know more about getting along with humans than anyone...
こっちで青空教室を開くと言ってたけど……んん？<br>鬼族は集まってるが、みんな:
She said she'd open an outdoor class here, but... hmm?
The oni-folk are gathered, but they all have troubled, blank looks...
まいったな……どうしたもんかね、こりゃ。: What are we gonna do... this is a problem.
おい、どうして何もしていない？<br>何か問題でもあったのか？: Hey, why isn't anything happening? Did something go wrong?
ああ、旦那かい。<br>いや、それがだね、シラエスの姐さんが……: Oh, the Commander. Well, you see, big sis Shiraes...
ふむ……人間とどう接すれば仲良くなれるか、か……。<br>あれは……いや、違うか:
Mm... how does one interact with humans to make friends...?
That... no, maybe not... then perhaps... hmm~~...
もう、かれこれ５時間ほど、ああやって空を見上げて唸るばかりでね……。<br>あた:
She's been staring at the sky and muttering like that for
about 5 hours now... we don't know what to do either.
第１回シラエス教室は１時間で終わる予定だっただろう！？<br>悩んでる間にどれだ:
The first Shiraes Seminar was supposed to end in one hour!
How far over is she going to run while she's thinking!?
おーい！ シラエス！ 戻ってこーい！<br>悩んでる場合じゃないぞ！ さっさと授:
Hey! Shiraes! Come back to us! This isn't the time for pondering!
Get the lesson going again, would you!
――うん、やはりこれに尽きるだろうな。<br>人間と仲良くなる方法……それは、同:
——Mm, yes, this is what it comes down to. The way to make friends
with humans... is to spend a long time together!
ふふふ、私にしてはすぐに答えを出せたな。<br>ずっと人間との触れ合いを学んでき:
Hehehe, quite fast for me to reach an answer.
The fruit of my years of studying human connection.
そう、どんなに性格が違えども、１００年くらい一緒に過ごし、<br>同じ釜の飯を食:
Yes — no matter how different their personalities, 100 years
of sharing a life and meals together should do it.
どうかな？ 名案だとは思わないか、司令官君？:
What do you think? Rather a good plan, don't you think,
Commander-kun?
長時間考えてもらって悪いが……その計画には致命的な穴がある。<br>……俺たちの:
Sorry for making you think so long, but... there's a fatal flaw.
...Our lifespans aren't quite that long.
んあぁぁぁ～～～っ！ そ、そうだったぁ～～っ！<br>なぜ私は、いつになってもエ:
Nnaahh~~~! R-right, that's right~~! Why can I never fix
my elven sense of time, no matter how long it's been~~~!
大丈夫ですっ！ シラエスママは一生懸命やってくれてます！<br>自分を卑下しない:
You're doing wonderfully! Mama Shiraes is giving it everything!
Please don't be so hard on yourself!
そうだよ、姐さん！<br>あたいらもシラエスの姉御を信じてるよ！: She's right, big sis! We all believe in you, Shiraes!
き、君たちは……なんっって優しいんだぁ～！<br>本当に、本当にぃ、いい子たちば:
Y-you all... how incredibly kind you are~~!
Truly, truly, you're all such good people~~~! I love you all~~~!
（もう仲良くなったのか、こいつら……いや、待てよ？<br>シラエスがこれだけ慕わ:
(They're already friends... wait. Why is Shiraes
so beloved? There might be a hint in that.)
シラエス、ちょっと聞きたいんだが、<br>お前は人間と接する時、何を考えている？:
Shiraes, can I ask — what are you thinking
when you interact with humans?
私か？ ふむ……別段、何も意識はしていないな。<br>ただ君たちを尊敬し、人間が:
Me? Mm... nothing in particular, I suppose.
I simply respect you all and convey my love for humans.
気持ちを伝える、か……うん、シンプルだが、<br>そういうことが大事なのかもしれ:
Conveying how you feel, huh... Simple,
but that might be what matters most.
鬼族も、シラエスみたいに人間が大好きで、優しい心を持っている。<br>だったら―:
The oni-folk love humans and have kind hearts, just like Shiraes.
Then all that's needed is to convey that. Strategy isn't everything.
それについて、シラエスも交えてちょっと話そうか。<br>意外と、解決策は簡単なこ:
Let's talk it through, Shiraes included.
The solution might be simpler than you'd think.
鬼族の想いと、その伝え方を知った<user>。<br>彼の考えで、鬼ヶ島は大きく:
Having understood the oni-folk's feelings and how to express them,
%user%'s idea was about to bring great change to Oni Island——
鬼ヶ島へと大勢の村人たちが向かってくるのを見て、<br>クレハたちは目を丸くした:
Kureha and the others stared wide-eyed as a large crowd of villagers
made their way toward Oni Island.
す、すごい……！ あんなにたくさんの人たちが……！<br>旦那様、いったいどうや:
Th-this is incredible...! So many people...!
Darling, how on earth did you manage this!?
人を動かすのは得意でな。近隣の村に声をかけておいたんだ。<br>新しくできた観光:
Moving people is what I do. I reached out to nearby villages.
Free entry to a new tourist spot, plus souvenirs — that did it.
最初は怪しんでいたが、結局はこの通りだ。<br>クックック――人間は無料という言:
They were suspicious at first, but here we are. Heh heh heh——
humans have a weakness for the word 'free'! Just as I thought!
……鬼ヶ島っていうのを伏せてかい？ なんだか、騙してるようだな……。<br>私は:
...You concealed it was Oni Island? That feels like deception...
I don't recall raising you to be a petty schemer, Commander-kun.
それでも……クレハは、旦那様がどんなに邪な心を持っていようと、<br>永遠に愛し:
Even so... Kureha will love her darling forever,
no matter how wicked his heart may be...!
し、失敬なやつらだな……うまくいったんだからいいじゃねぇか。<br>それに見てみ:
Y-you're all so rude... it worked, didn't it?
And just look at how happy the oni-folk are!
おおぉっ……！<br>おれたちの鬼ヶ島に、人間たちがあんなに遊びに来てくれてる…:
Ohhh...! Humans are actually coming to visit
our Oni Island in droves...!
こんな光景が見られるなんてね……！<br>夢みたいじゃないのさ、こんなの！: To see a sight like this...! It's like a dream, isn't it!
みんな、喜んでいるね。嘘も方便と思おう。<br>でも、ここからは鬼族のみんな次第:
Everyone's so happy. Let's call it a justified means.
But from here, it's up to the oni-folk.
シラエス様の言う通りです！ みなさん、まだ終わったわけじゃないですよ！<br>大:
Shiraes-sama is right! Everyone, it's not over yet!
What matters is how we welcome them from here!
絶対に成功させて、人間のみなさんと仲良くなりましょう！！: Let's make this a success and become friends with humans!!
それではみんな、準備はいいですか？<br>せぇぇ～～～～のっ――！: Alright everyone, are you ready? Here we go~~——!
……ここだな？ おれさまの宝が流れ着いたのは。<br>なぁにが鬼族だ。盗賊から宝:
...This is where my treasure washed up. Oni-folk, huh.
Take a thief's loot? Not a chance...!
